news.t: VistaShares Launches the POW ETF to Provide Pure Exposure to the Power Generation Infrastructure Needed for AI to Reach Its Full Potential

holdings.infoBox: POW is an equity ETF with a total of 62 individual holdings. The top holdings are LS ELECTRIC stock at 8.93%, Delta Electronics at 7.43%, Powell Industries at 6.69%, Vicor at 5.56%, and Quanta Services at 4.79%.

overview.description: The VistaShares Electrification Supercycle ETF (POW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in companies tied to the Electrification Supercycle value chain. The fund closely follows a reference index that provides exposure to companies associated with electronic vehicles. POW was launched on Oct 28, 2025 and is issued by VistaShares.

data.title: VistaShares Launches the POW ETF to Provide Pure Exposure to the Power Generation Infrastructure Needed for AI to Reach Its Full Potential
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VistaShares launches POW ETF amidst unprecedented investment in modern energy grids, integrated storage solutions and distributed power systems.
